title: 11. Screen and Clipboard
description: How to use desktop and clipboard context without turning every observation into a visible user request.

steps.title: Ambient vs Deliberate Context
steps.body: Screen is ambient: it reflects what is visible on the desktop. Clipboard is deliberate: it reflects something the user intentionally copied.

steps.title: Screen Source
steps.body: Screen is best for ambient awareness: current app, visible content, or broad patterns that might deserve a character reaction.

steps.title: Clipboard Source
steps.body: Clipboard is best for copied screenshots, reference images, inspiration images, and anything the user explicitly places on the clipboard.

steps.title: Behavior Safety
steps.body: Use strict triggers for proactive comments. A broad trigger can feel noisy, while a specific trigger makes NC's reactions feel intentional.
